requirements.summary: Create consistent header with LUCKY HOLIDAYS logo and navigation to Home, About, Vehicles, Contact Us, and Ratings pages
acceptanceCriteria: Header displays the LUCKY HOLIDAYS travel logo alongside the company name on all pages
Clicking the logo navigates the user to the Home page
Navigation bar includes links: Home, About, Vehicles, Contact Us, Ratings
Active navigation link is visually highlighted
Header and navigation are consistent across all pages

file_operations.description: Create a Header component displaying the LUCKY HOLIDAYS logo (using frontend/public/assets/generated/lucky-holidays-logo.dim_200x200.png) and company name with click navigation to Home. Include a navigation bar with links to Home, About, Vehicles, Contact Us, and Ratings. Apply active link highlighting using React Router's NavLink. Use warm travel-themed colors (amber, deep green) consistent with the design theme.
Create a Layout wrapper component that includes the Header component and renders children content below it. This ensures consistent header presence across all pages.

requirements.summary: Create Home page with hero section, company introduction, service highlights, and call-to-action to Contact page
acceptanceCriteria: Home page renders with a visually compelling hero/banner section
Brief company introduction text is displayed
Key services or features are highlighted with icons or cards
A call-to-action button is present and navigates to the Contact Us page

file_operations.description: Create the Home page with a hero section using the generated banner image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1400x500.png). Include a brief introduction to LUCKY HOLIDAYS tours and travels. Display key service highlights (tour packages, vehicle rentals, guided trips) using card-based layout. Add a prominent call-to-action button that navigates to the Contact Us page. Apply warm travel-themed styling with earthy tones.

requirements.summary: Create About page describing LUCKY HOLIDAYS company mission, values, and story
acceptanceCriteria: About page renders with company history/story section
Mission and values are presented clearly
Page is accessible from the navigation bar

file_operations.description: Create the About page featuring sections for company history, mission statement, and core values in the tours and travels industry. Use card-based layout with warm earthy color scheme. Include engaging typography with bold serif-style headings and clean body text describing LUCKY HOLIDAYS' journey and commitment to customer travel experiences.

requirements.summary: Create Vehicles page displaying available vehicles in a card-based grid with images, names, types, capacity, and descriptions
acceptanceCriteria: Vehicles page renders with a grid of vehicle cards
Each card displays a vehicle image, name, type, capacity, and description
Page is accessible from the navigation bar

file_operations.description: Create the Vehicles page displaying available travel vehicles in a responsive grid layout. Each vehicle card shows the vehicle image (using frontend/public/assets/generated/vehicle-placeholder.dim_400x280.png as placeholder), vehicle name, type (e.g., minibus, van, SUV), passenger capacity, and brief description. Apply warm travel-themed card styling with hover effects. Ensure responsive grid adapts to mobile and desktop viewports.

requirements.summary: Create Contact Us page displaying phone number 9663202989 and email lakkiholidays@gmail.com with a contact inquiry form
acceptanceCriteria: Contact page displays phone number 9663202989 prominently
Contact page displays email lakkiholidays@gmail.com prominently
Email address is a clickable mailto link
Phone number is a clickable tel link
A contact form with name, email, and message fields is present
Page is accessible from the navigation bar

file_operations.description: Create the Contact Us page prominently displaying phone number 9663202989 as a clickable tel: link and email address lakkiholidays@gmail.com as a clickable mailto: link. Include a contact inquiry form with name, email, and message input fields and a submit button. Apply warm travel-themed styling with card-based form layout. Form handles client-side validation before submission.

requirements.summary: Create Ratings page displaying customer reviews and star ratings with submission form
acceptanceCriteria: Ratings page displays existing customer reviews with star ratings and review text
Users can submit a new rating (1–5 stars) and review comment
Submitted ratings are persisted in the backend
Average overall rating is displayed
Page is accessible from the navigation bar

file_operations.description: Create the Ratings page that fetches and displays existing customer ratings and reviews from the backend using getAllRatings() and getAllReviews() methods. Calculate and display the average overall star rating. Show individual reviews with star ratings and review text in card layout. Include a submission form allowing users to select a star rating (1–5) and write a review comment. On submission, call backend methods submitRating(stars) and submitReview(content). Apply warm travel-themed styling consistent with the site design.

requirements.summary: Apply warm travel-themed visual design with earthy tones, bold typography, responsive card layouts across all pages
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses warm earthy tones (amber, orange, deep green) consistently
Typography uses bold, readable headings and clean body text
Layout is responsive and renders well on both mobile and desktop
Visual theme is consistent across all pages

file_operations.description: Update global styles to define warm travel-themed color palette with CSS custom properties for amber, warm orange, and deep green tones. Set base typography with bold serif-style headings and clean body text. Ensure responsive layout utilities and card-based component styles are available globally.

Extend Tailwind configuration to include custom color palette for warm earthy tones (amber, warm orange, deep green). Add custom font family definitions for bold serif-style headings. Configure responsive breakpoints and spacing utilities to support mobile and desktop layouts consistently.

Set up React Router routing for all pages: Home (/), About (/about), Vehicles (/vehicles), Contact Us (/contact), and Ratings (/ratings). Wrap all routes with the Layout component to ensure consistent header and navigation. Configure the router to highlight active navigation links.
